sample.title: clip_0_0: Imagine that the cannonball was not in the scene at all. How likely is it that the pink sphere would end up on the grass?

code.parse_mode_reason: Bass2022Partial is a 2D dynamic cartoon stimulus; 3D lifting is forbidden.

attached_trials.prompt: Imagine that the cannonball was not in the scene at all. How likely is it that the pink sphere would end up on the grass?

symbolic_scene.note: pinkball and cannonball positions co-vary with index i (pb_i=cannonball shifts horizontally with pinkball). Velocity index j selects from 7 angles (direct hit to close miss in 2-degree increments).

symbolic_query.prompt: Imagine that the cannonball was not in the scene at all. How likely is it that the pink sphere would end up on the grass?

attached_trials.prompt: How likely is it that the cannonball will hit the pink sphere?

symbolic_scene.note: pinkball and cannonball positions co-vary with index i (pb_i=cannonball shifts horizontally with pinkball). Velocity index j selects from 7 angles (direct hit to close miss in 2-degree increments).

symbolic_query.prompt: How likely is it that the cannonball will hit the pink sphere?

attached_trials.prompt: How likely is it that the cannonball will hit the pink sphere, and then the pink sphere will end up on the grass?

symbolic_scene.note: pinkball and cannonball positions co-vary with index i (pb_i=cannonball shifts horizontally with pinkball). Velocity index j selects from 7 angles (direct hit to close miss in 2-degree increments).

symbolic_query.prompt: How likely is it that the cannonball will hit the pink sphere, and then the pink sphere will end up on the grass?
